goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'centre' and should serve 'italian' food.
The restaurant should be in the 'cheap' price range.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'carolina bed and breakfast'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel', 'price range', and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
